title: Time Tracking start / stop button in Kanban
excerpt: I have just found the new Kanban boards.  I’m using them for task tracking and I would like an option to add the time trackers to the Kanban card so I can easily start and stop timers from that view.

posts.author: simon.ruddock (Simon Ruddock)
posts.cookedHtml: I have just found the new Kanban boards. I’m using them for task tracking and I would like an option to add the time trackers to the Kanban card so I can easily start and stop timers from that view.
